+++ b/api.py

commit_message: Update user ID type and processing
pr_description: Convert user ID to string in API. Relax check in processor.

causal_chain.description: Changing integer return type to string in api.py causes TypeError in processor.py during integer comparison.
Changing integer return type to string in api.py causes TypeError in processor.py during integer comparison.
